nasb.text: When Saul inquired of the Lord, the Lord did not answer him, either by dreams or by Urim or by prophets.

esv.text: And when Saul inquired of the Lord, the Lord did not answer him, either by dreams, or by Urim, or by prophets.

cnv.text: 掃羅求問耶和華，耶和華卻沒有藉著夢，或烏陵，或先知回答他。

ccb.text: 就求问耶和华，但耶和华没有借着梦、乌陵或先知回答他。
